Get Tor ↗

How to use Tor privacy:

  1. Download & open Tor Browser
  2. Keep Tor Browser running in the background
  3. Enable the toggle above
  4. All RPC calls will route through Tor

How to use Tor privacy:

  1. Download & open Tor Browser
  2. Keep Tor Browser running in the background
  3. Enable the toggle above
  4. All RPC calls will route through Tor
